A certification (versus recertification) is considered to be anytime that a Start of Care 
OASIS is completed to initiate care. In such instances, a physician or allowed 
practitioner must certify (attest) that: 

1. The home health services are or were needed because the patient is or was confined to 
the home as defined in §30.1.1; 

2. The patient needs or needed skilled nursing services on an intermittent basis (other
